name: Monster Trucks Stunts
description: Monster Trucks Stunts is an adrenaline-pumping, action-packed mobile game that puts you in the drivers seat of powerful, roaring monster trucks. Get ready to unleash your inner daredevil as you embark on an exciting journey of stunt-filled mayhem! Take on various challenging levels across diverse landscapes, from sprawling urban cities to rugged off-road terrains, each designed to test your driving skills to the limit. Perform jaw-dropping stunts like gravity-defying jumps, thrilling flips. Website Developer
